description: A named payload binding on an engine state-child that references a field the variant does not declare fires E-TYPE-022 (§18.7 / §51.0.B.1). The `.Loaded` variant declares fields title/author/count; the state-child `<Loaded bogus=b …>` binds by the name `bogus`, which no declared field matches, so the symbol-table pass reports E-TYPE-022. Incidental W-PROGRAM-SPA-INFERRED is ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §18.7 / §51.0.B.1 named-form payload bindings bind by DECLARED field name; a named binding `field=local` whose `field` is not on the variant is a compile error (E-TYPE-022), steering the author to a correct field name or the positional form.
